estimators.name: Andrew Coleman
estimators.title: Director of Pre-Construction, Contempora Steel Builders
education: University of Sydney — Bachelor of Economics
personalization_hooks: Red River College BTech alum — STRONGEST shared-pipeline angle in this entire batch. Lead with this.
Ex-Graham Construction PM — Graham is a major Winnipeg GC; Andrew has cross-pollinated relationships across both firms

Bachelor of Economics from University of Sydney — international background, business-minded; Ahmad's automated reporting + delay-forecasting tools resonate with someone who appreciates data-driven cost/schedule control
His ZoomInfo profile literally calls out 'cost and schedule management' as his strength — Ahmad's 6-day forecast pitch is purpose-built for this person
Director-level — runs preconstruction and decides bid list at a 47-year Manitoba builder

sources.claim: Director, Pre-Construction at Contempora; email pattern @contemporasteel.com
Company since 1978; Manitoba commercial design-build specialists

estimators.name: Marc Ouimet
estimators.title: Construction Estimator, Contempora Steel Builders
personalization_hooks: Reports into Andrew Coleman's preconstruction group — the day-to-day estimator who actually works the bid math
Useful as a parallel/secondary point of contact alongside Andrew
If Ashrah wants to be on a specific bid, Marc is who actually pulls the sub list together

sources.claim: Marc Ouimet listed as Construction Estimator

fallback_contact.name: George Constantinides
fallback_contact.title: Owner / Sales Director (President), Contempora Steel Builders
fallback_contact.rationale: George owns the company (bought it from founder Russ Edwards in 1997), University of Manitoba Architecture grad (1990), came up the firm: draftsman → designer → estimator → sales/owner. Strong Winnipeg roots — born and raised. He came up THROUGH estimating himself, so he respects the discipline. Mention U of M Architecture if Ahmad has any U of M ties.
